overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in a red duster coat exploring a dimly lit industrial interior with metal corridors, staircases, and scattered NPCs. The character walks through narrow passages, passes a seated NPC, examines overhead structures, and enters a side room.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor with corrugated metal walls on both sides. A workbench with green containers sits to the left while the character approaches a dark doorway ahead marked with caution tape.

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a wider industrial common area featuring a metal staircase leading upward. A seated NPC in red clothing rests on a bench to the right. The space opens up with exposed piping visible overhead as the character approaches the stairwell.

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the base of the metal staircase and the camera tilts upward to reveal a grid of fluorescent lights on the ceiling and ventilation pipes. The upper platform with metal railings is visible above as the character observes the vertical space.

cardboard boxes and containers scattered on the floor near the entrance
dark colored sofa or bench against the far wall of the main area

segments.scene_description: The character turns left away from the stairwell and approaches an open doorway leading to a side storage area. Storage boxes are scattered near the entrance while a couch and ladder are visible in the background against the metal walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cramped industrial corridor that opens into a wider common area before shifting toward a secluded storage room. It begins with the character walking past a workbench and green containers along corrugated metal walls, moving steadily toward a dark doorway marked with caution tape. As the character turns right, the space expands into a common area where a seated NPC rests on a bench beneath a network of exposed overhead piping. The camera then tilts upward from the base of a metal staircase to reveal a grid of fluorescent ceiling lights and ventilation pipes above a railed platform, before turning away from the stairs. Finally, the movement leads the character through an open doorway into a side storage area filled with scattered boxes, a couch, and a ladder against the metal walls.
